evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about data validation in a pipeline
evals.prompt: I need to add data validation checks to our ETL pipeline that loads orders into the warehouse

evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about data contracts
evals.prompt: How do I define a data contract between our analytics team and the payments team?

evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about data lineage
evals.prompt: I need to track which tables depend on our raw.orders table so I can assess impact of schema changes

evals.description: Agent can write a Great Expectations suite with correct API
evals.prompt: Write a Great Expectations expectation suite for a users table with columns user_id, email, created_at, and plan_type

evals.description: Agent can create a GX checkpoint for pipeline integration
evals.prompt: Show me how to run a Great Expectations checkpoint in an Airflow DAG that fails the task if validation fails

evals.description: Agent can write a SQL freshness check
evals.prompt: Write a SQL query to check if the events table has received data in the last 30 minutes

evals.description: Agent can define a data contract YAML spec
evals.prompt: Create a data contract for our payments table that the analytics team consumes

evals.description: Agent can emit OpenLineage events for lineage tracking
evals.prompt: Show me how to emit lineage events from a Python transformation job using OpenLineage

evals.description: Agent handles volume anomaly detection correctly
evals.prompt: How do I detect when a table has significantly fewer rows than usual without hardcoding a threshold?

evals.description: Agent handles schema drift detection as an edge case
evals.prompt: A new column appeared in our source table overnight and broke our pipeline. How do we prevent this?

evals.description: Agent does not hallucinate a GX method that does not exist
evals.prompt: Use Great Expectations to check if a column has valid JSON format

evals.description: Agent does not invent a non-existent OpenLineage method
evals.prompt: Track column-level lineage for a SQL transformation using OpenLineage

evals.description: Agent correctly references the great-expectations-advanced reference file
evals.prompt: I need to write a custom Great Expectations expectation that checks if email addresses match our corporate domain
